taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: AI-assisted development tools, Python, Django, JavaScript frameworks, RESTful APIs
skill_match_scores: AI-assisted development tools:0.0, Python:1.0, Django:0.0, JavaScript frameworks:0.5, RESTful APIs:1.0
must_have_quals: Hands-on experience with AI-assisted development tools (e.g. Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cursor) — AI should be a natural, everyday part of how you work, Demonstrated ability to take ownership of a project and drive it independently across frontend, backend, and data layers, Experience with data analytics or engineering (ETL pipelines, data visualization), Experience with RESTful APIs and third-party integration patterns, Experience building interactive dashboards or BI tools, Familiarity with databases (PostgreSQL, Redis, etc.), Comfortable working in Agile environments using CI/CD and automated testing, Excellent problem-solving, communication, and collaboration skills in a remote team environment, Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field, or equivalent practical experience, At least 3 years of professional experience in software development
core_responsibilities: Collaborate with the CTO and product/engineering team to define and implement technical solutions, Own projects end-to-end — from architecture and implementation to testing and deployment — working autonomously across multiple areas of the stack, Use AI coding tools (such as Claude Code) extensively as a core part of your daily development workflow, Build and extend product modules across the full stack, including integrations, data pipelines, dashboards, and new feature development, Collaborate on CI/CD pipelines, automated testing suites, and code reviews to maintain system reliability
job_summary: Fullsteam is a leading provider of vertical software and embedded payments technology. They are seeking a proactive Full-Stack Software Developer to enhance their Priswing product suite, collaborating with the CTO and engineering team on various tech stack enhancements and leveraging AI tools to improve product scalability and client value.
